Title: Insert Plant Record
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data: - Valid plant record details (name, type, location)
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the "Inserimento/Modifica Piante" use case.
2. System sends plant record details to DataManager.
3. DataManager processes the plant record and stores it.
Expected Result: Plant record is successfully inserted into the database.

Title: Retrieve Plant Record
Preconditions: Plant record exists in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the "Lettura Piante" use case.
2. System sends plant record ID to DataManager.
3. DataManager retrieves the plant record from the database.
Expected Result: Plant record details are returned to the user.

Title: Update Plant Record
Preconditions: Plant record exists in the database.
Test Data: - Valid plant record ID and updated details (name, type, location)
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the "Inserimento/Modifica Piante" use case.
2. System sends plant record ID and updated details to DataManager.
3. DataManager updates the plant record in the database.
Expected Result: Plant record is successfully updated in the database.

Title: Delete Plant Record
Preconditions: Plant record exists in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the "Inserimento/Modifica Piante" use case.
2. System sends plant record ID to DataManager.
3. DataManager deletes the plant record from the database.
Expected Result: Plant record is successfully deleted from the database.

Title: Capture Photo and Associate with Plant
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User captures a photo using the Fotocamera.
2. User associates the captured photo with a specific plant record.
3. Fotocamera interacts with LeMiePiante to store the photo.
Expected Result: Photo is successfully associated with the specified plant record.

Title: Identify Plant Species from Photo
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User captures a photo using the Fotocamera.
2. Fotocamera sends the photo to the Gemini AI API for species identification.
3. Gemini AI API identifies the plant species.
4. Identified species information is stored in Firebase Storage.
Expected Result: Plant species is correctly identified and stored.

Title: Sign In with Email and Password
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to sign in using the "signInWithEmailAndPassword" method.
2. Authentication uses FirebaseAuthentication to verify credentials.
3. If successful, a token is generated.
4. User is redirected to the Home screen.
Expected Result: User is successfully signed in and redirected to the Home screen.

Title: Sign Out
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the "signOut" method.
2. Authentication signs out the user.
3. User is redirected to the sign-in screen.
Expected Result: User is successfully signed out and redirected to the sign-in screen.

Title: Change Password
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data: - Current valid password and new valid password
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the "changePassword" method.
2. Authentication verifies the current password.
3. If verified, the new password is set.
4. User is redirected to the Home screen.
Expected Result: Password is successfully changed and user is redirected to the Home screen.

Title: Request Plant Species Identification
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User captures a photo using the Fotocamera.
2. Fotocamera sends the photo to the Gemini AI API for species identification.
3. Gemini AI API identifies the plant species.
4. Identified species information is stored in Firebase Storage.
Expected Result: Plant species is correctly identified and stored.

Title: Upload Image to Personal Storage
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User captures a photo using the Fotocamera.
2. Fotocamera uploads the photo to Firebase Storage.
3. Firebase Storage returns the download URL of the uploaded photo.
Expected Result: Photo is successfully uploaded and the download URL is returned.

Title: Retrieve Personal Storage Path
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User requests personal storage path from Firebase Storage.
2. Firebase Storage returns the personal storage path.
Expected Result: Personal storage path is successfully retrieved.

Title: Retrieve Photos of Each Species
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User requests photos of each species from Firebase Storage.
2. Firebase Storage retrieves and returns the URIs of the requested photos.
Expected Result: Photos of each species are successfully retrieved and their URIs are returned.

Title: Generate Text with Images
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data: - Valid text input and image references
Test Steps:
1. User provides text input and image references to GeneraAI.
2. GeneraAI generates text based on the provided input and images.
3. Generated text is stored in SharedPreference.
Expected Result: Text is successfully generated and stored in SharedPreference.

Title: Generate Text Only
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User provides text input to GeneraAI.
2. GeneraAI generates text based on the provided input.
3. Generated text is stored in SharedPreference.
Expected Result: Text is successfully generated and stored in SharedPreference.

Title: Store Generated Text
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User generates text using GeneraAI.
2. Generated text is stored in SharedPreference.
Expected Result: Generated text is successfully stored in SharedPreference.

Title: Retrieve Stored Text
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps: 1. User retrieves stored text from SharedPreference.
Expected Result: Stored text is successfully retrieved from SharedPreference.

Title: Successful Login Process
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the login process from the Main node.
2. LocalUser requests a token from Authentication.
3. If token is not null, requestToken() is executed.
4. If token is null or status is OK, request dati utente is executed.
5. New LocalUser is created and process ends.
Expected Result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the Home screen.
